Video.summary: Mark Peterson is in the final stretch of completing the South America Upland Slam. Having already checked off nine species in Argentina, he now finds himself in Peru, where he faces the challenge of tracking down two elusive species to complete his list: the Andean Tinamou and the Western Peruvian Dove.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Peru"

Video.summary: Low country BBQ and Redfish? What more do you want?
Video.title: "Palm Beach BBQ"

Video.summary: Continuing on with his quest for The North America Deer Slam, Mark Peterson packs his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle for a hunt in Mexico targeting the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail from elevated blinds. The outfitter here has done an amazing job managing the deer numbers and age groups to grow giant whitetails. Mark is anticipating the pre-rut will get these big bucks moving.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike and Dallas King take advantage of a powerful summer tide, hooking into an all-out redfish frenzy where the action never slows down.
Video.title: "King Tide"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff hear about the dangers of fishing for Bluefin Tuna in the Atlantic Ocean from locals in Gloucester, Massachusetts. Then they head 30 miles out onto the open ocean with Darrin of Reel Respect Charters in the hopes of landing their own giant.
Video.title: "Gloucester Giant Bluefin"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: Ismael Garcia was just a young soldier when a tragic incident in Afghanistan changed his life forever. He was left wounded and scarred, but the hardest part came after he returned home. Hunting had always been his escape. But after war, everything felt different — until he picked up a bow.
Video.title: "SOLITUDE"

Video.summary: Will Cooper finally trades 3 years of tough times for triumph in his quest to tag an out-of-state buck with a bow.
Video.title: "Nine Lives"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike navigates South Carolina’s breathtaking marsh, seizing a brief window when the seasonal high tide floods the grass, bringing incredible fishing.
Video.title: "Flood Tide"

Video.summary: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 1"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike heads to Venice, LA, to explore a unique bayou technique —beach fishing for redfish and black drum in the heart of the Gulf.
Video.title: "Redfish Lodge"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss is fishing the South Carolina low country with Captain Stephen Flook Jr. The weather is cold and windy, but the plan remains the same, FULL SEND!
Video.title: "Full Send"

Video.summary: CA heads to the scenic Low country of South Carolina for part one of an epic two-part redfish adventure.
Video.title: "Low Country Beat Down Pt 1"

Video.summary: The South Carolina redfish mission continues! C.A. and Stephen hunt for redfish in unfamiliar territory.
Video.title: "Low Country Beat Down Pt 2"

Video.summary: JP flies to British Columbia to tackle 4 fisheries using 4 different techniques targeting some of the regions popular species.
Video.title: "British Columbia Challenge"

Video.summary: Deep in the heart of the Darien Jungle is the first annual Pirate Tournament taking place at Tropic Star Lodge.
Video.title: "Panama Pirate Tournament"

Video.summary: JP heads to a small tributary off of Lake Ontario to target Spring Steelhead after a major rain fall.
Video.title: "Steelhead Suprise"

Video.summary: Week 1 of the Tropic Star Inshore Seminars features guests targeting a plethora of species in the life rich waters surrounding the lodge.
Video.title: "Tropic Star Inshore Seminar 1"

Video.summary: Kyle and Skeet are headed to Oklahoma to hunt Rios with Mark Scroggins. An early morning setup almost works but some quick adjustments and timely calling puts a gobbler on the cow trail and coming right to the second setup! The APEX Turkey Ninja TSS .410 load crumbles another longbeard!
Video.title: "COW TRAILS & TURKEY TAILS"

Video.summary: Part two of Skeet, Kyle and Mark chasing longbeards in Texas. They have gobblers in three directions and one reads the script perfectly...well, almost.
Video.title: "GOBBLING FOOL"

Video.summary: The final installment with Mark, Kyle and Skeet chasing Rio's in Texas. They have had some success but this one gobbler keeps giving them the slip. They are down to the wire and change tactics to see if they can beat this ol bird at his own game.
Video.title: "IT'S NOT OVER TILL IT'S OVER"

Video.summary: On a crisp Iowa November morning, everything comes together as Drake Lamb with Midwest Whitetail grunts in a massive 8-point buck that he encountered before with the WoodHaven Midwest Grunter. This is one hunt you don’t want to miss!
Video.title: "Dream November Hunt"

Video.summary: Mike visits Crystal River and fishes with one of his Citrus County friends, Capt JC Livingston, where they battle the good, the bad and the ugly that comes with Tarpon fishing!
Video.title: "100 Ways To Lose A Tarpon"

Video.summary: CA’s skiff gets an upgrade. Now no fish is safe.
Video.title: "No Water? No Problem"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Flamingo, Everglades National Park, in search of silver and gold.
Video.title: "Fiesta in Flamingo"

Video.summary: From Miami to Apalachicola Bay, Florida, Capt. Jonathan Moss revisits some of his favorite moments from this season.
Video.title: "From Bow to Stern"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss and Captain James Hillman are heading out of Highland Park Fish Camp in Deland, Florida, looking for largemouth bass.
Video.title: “Rustic Retreat”

Video.summary: Shan Twit, the newest member of Team200, chases some big whitetails in his home state of Kentucky!
Video.title: "Bluegrass Bucks"

Video.summary: The crew is loaded up and headed to Utah for an early season velvet mule deer hunt! This trip quickly becomes about more than just the trigger pull as Austin and Jerry both find themselves going after two giant mule deer that they put all of their time and energy into chasing.
Video.title: The - "More Than Just A Trigger Pull"

Image.alt: The - "More Than Just A Trigger Pull"
The - "More Than Just A Trigger Pull"
The - "More Than Just A Trigger Pull"

Video.summary: Welcome to The Fly Shop Tour! In September of 2022, we set across the Rocky Mountains on a 2500 Mile Road Trip visiting & fishing with local Fly Shops. Our Mission? To highlight small businesses that drive the sport we love: Fly Fishing! Along the way, we got a chance to host meetups in every state - all with the goal to raise money for local conservation organizations & meet some of our fans. Follow us as we tell the story of 12 unique fly shops, fish the waters surrounding their area, and make our way throughout the Rocky Mountains.
Video.title: "Our 2500 Mile ROAD TRIP Begins"

Video.summary: The Flylords team heads to Wyoming for an unforgettable adventure. Join them as they explore incredible fly-fishing opportunities and learn about the passionate folks behind Two Rivers Fishing Co. and Worldcast Anglers. Along the way, they share stories, fish some of Wyoming's best waters, and meet the dedicated guides who call this place home. The team also participates in a special event at Roadhouse Brewing Co., raising money for Jackson Hole Trout Unlimited to help conserve and protect local trout populations.
Video.title: "Hungry Trout in Crystal CLEAR Water"

Video.summary: Everything is bigger in Texas, including the stories. With the whitetail rut in the midwest winding down, the Winchester Life Crew of Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Nikki Boxler and Paul Sawyer head south to the Texas Panhandle with Winchesters in hand hoping to wrangle in a few Texas-sized giants.
Video.title: “Lonestar Legends”

Video.summary: As an avid bird hunter who grew up sharing his passion with his dad, Mark Peterson has traveled the globe pursuing his favorite game. After completing the North America Upland Slam and the New Zealand Wingshooting Slam both in a single season, he’s setting his sights on the South America Upland Slam.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Patagonia"

Video.summary: On day three of Mark Peterson’s South America Upland Slam adventure, the guys are snowed in while waiting to head to La Pampa, where the weather promised to be much better. After a tense wait for the go-ahead to fly out, they finally touched down in La Pampa and headed straight to the field. There, the grasslands and scattered thickets provide the perfect habitat for Bushed Tinamou, known for their elusive nature and penchant for hiding among dense underbrush. Day four is dedicated to hunting these Tinamou, with Mark eager to track them in their natural habitat. On day five, their focus shifts to Pigeons, where they set up decoys along the edge of a cut cornfield. The anticipation of drawing in flocks makes for an incredible hunt and Mark can’t wait to see what the day will bring.
Video.title: "South American Upland Slam - La Pampa"

Video.summary: Mark is wrapping up his Argentina hunt and heading to Entre Rios to track down the final two birds on his list: the Rock Pigeon and the Eared Dove. This area is home to over 10 million birds, making it a prime hunting ground. With flocks of pigeons and doves filling the skies, Mark is set for a fast-paced, action-packed finish to his hunt—a perfect end to an unforgettable adventure.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Entre Rios"

Video.summary: Kyle Green meets up with his friends at the National Wild Turkey Federation to dive into turkey conservation, and hunt the largest subspecies of wild turkey. Kyle finishes off this episode with his most favorite wild game recipe, boneless wild turkey wings.
Video.title: "The Great Eastern Turkey"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and Jeff Hutchinson head to Northern Maine to hunt for moose and learn about the conservation of this species which is under attack by winter ticks. Can reducing moose numbers be the key to saving the local moose population from this deadly parasite?
Video.title: "The Maine Moose"

Video.summary: Kyle Green is joined by his childhood friends in his home state of Michigan for a trout fishing adventure. They visit the most dynamic landmarks in the Upper Peninsula, do a little cliff jumping, and finish out the trip cooking trout riverside.
Video.title: "Upper Peninsula Trout Adventures"

Video.summary: Kyle Green heads to Yankton, South Dakota to learn about the history of the Missouri river and the people who count on the river for sustenance. The invasive carp are set to destroy this rich ecosystem and Kyle aims to stop this fish with his best weapon, a great recipe.
Video.title: "Invasive Carp Disaster"

Video.summary: Join Dan Cabela in New Zealand's breathtaking landscapes as he hunts non-native species, delving into the crucial role of controlled harvesting and the complexities of managing introduced wildlife.
Video.title: "Hunting in the Kiwi Wilds"

Video.summary: In Episode 3, Josh starts off in the Twin Cities where he meets up with Yia Vang, an award-winning Hmong chef and restaurant owner, bringing his family’s traditions and flavors to the American Midwest. As Josh heads up north to Duluth and the boundary waters, he’ll meet plenty of farmers and foragers—harvesting mushrooms, wild rice, and catching a few fish (and waves) along the way. It all wraps up with an epic feast hosted by Yia back in the cities.
Video.title: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"
DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"
DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"

Video.summary: Host Ryan McVinney takes Boat Trader fans on an indepth exploration of Florida flats fishing deep in the backcountry of Islamorada. Featuring Captain Eric Lund, a Wall Street Broker turned backcountry fishing guide, this episode reveals the key design features of the world’s best flats skiffs and how they are built for targeting some of the most exciting sportfish species on the planet. Also, covered are bay boats and their versatility for families exploring Florida’s coastal waterways, along with a detailed study of fish species and wildlife in the region. Some of the area’s most beautiful and secret locales show why Islamorada has earned the nickname of the Sportfish Capital of The World.
Video.title: "Fishing Florida's Backcountry Wilderness"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team - highlighted deck repair and antique motor restoration, including storage solutions and structural enhancements.
Video.title: Essentials - "Repairing Rotten Deck & Restoring Antique Outboard"

Image.alt: Essentials - "Repairing Rotten Deck & Restoring Antique Outboard"
Essentials - "Repairing Rotten Deck & Restoring Antique Outboard"
Essentials - "Repairing Rotten Deck & Restoring Antique Outboard"

Video.summary: Josh and Alex Fogg The Coastal Resource Manager of Destin / Ft. Walton beach fish some of the artificial reefs that have been deployed over the past 20 years.
Video.title: “Alex Fogg”

Video.summary: In the Pilot episode of Goin’ Coastal High School sweethearts Josh and Anna Calhoon hit their local waters of Ft. Walton Beach, FL and show off the diversity of the Estuary.
Video.title: "Pilot"

Video.summary: Josh and good friend as well as fellow guide, Josh Nelson hit the beach for some stud Redfish. They also met with Alex Fogg (Coastal resource manager) for a redfish release with the CCA.
Video.title: "Josh Squared"

Video.summary: In this episode of going coastal, Capt. Joshua Calhoon & Marcus Castro set out for epic Tarpon fishing. They got one boat side and then decided to go after giant mangrove snapper for hook & cook at Pepper’s!
Video.title: "Tarponist"

Video.summary: Josh and Anna set out for a last minute fishing trip that runs a little late. They take a quick detour to the parent pick up line to get the kids from school, and head back out on the water to see what’s biting!
Video.title: "Family Time"

Video.summary: We are in Marathon, the heart of the Florida Keys, where crystal-clear waters meet charming island vibes. Known for its pristine dive sites, rich marine life, and welcoming locals, Marathon offers some of the best underwater adventures in the world.
Video.title: "Marathon"

Video.summary: In Missouri, we join Avery Epperson on the home farm with one goal in mind—catching up with a legendary buck known as Old Monroe. It doesn’t take long before the hunt heats up as the crew spots their target and works to grunt him into bow range. Hunting over a lush green plot on the home farm, Avery gets the chance every whitetail hunter dreams of.
Video.title: "Old Monroe"

Video.summary: Jeff Lindsey from The Lindsey Way is on a mission for one deer — a buck they call “Junior.” After passing him the year before, Jeff spends months trying to catch up with the elusive whitetail. He makes mistakes, second-guesses himself, and faces plenty of close calls. But exactly one year to the day after letting Junior walk, Jeff climbs back into the same stand — and this time, it all comes together.
Video.title: "The One They Call “Junior”"

Video.summary: Colten & Mark Scroggins is in Oklahoma during the peak rut, chasing mature whitetail bucks! With bucks on the move and searching for does, it's the perfect time to break out the calls. Watch as Mark and Colten pull out all the stops—getting aggressively loud with the WoodHaven "Intimidator" Grunt Call—to turn a cruising buck and bring him right into bow range at the blind.
Video.title: "Calling in a Rutting Buck"

Video.summary: Michael continues the family tradition of fish stew and gathering, with hopes that Larkin will pass on the same traditions.
Video.title: "Family Recipe"
